title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at Evok International Enterprises

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at Evok International Enterprises
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Evok International Enterprises! We are hiring a Visual Merchandiser for our Amritsar team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Evok International Enterprises:
Evok International Enterprises is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Inventory Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Evok International Enterprises!
